title: JustEnoughRecipes
description: Allows users with JEI installed to see Recipes on PaperMC Servers
body:
## What JustEnoughRecipes does

JustEnoughRecipes makes sure that Fabric mods like Just Enough Items (JEI) keep
working when you play on a non-modded server.

Starting with Minecraft 1.21.2, recipe syncing changed in a way that prevents JEI to work in a non-modded environment. Because of that, Fabric clients no longer receive the recipe
data they expect, and mods such as JEI can stop showing recipes or behave
incorrectly.

When a player joins the server, JustEnoughRecipes collects all crafting recipes
from the server and sends them to the client in the format Fabric mods expect.
This happens automatically and does not change gameplay in any way.

In simple terms:

- Bukkit / Spigot / Paper has the recipes
- Fabric mods need those recipes
- JustEnoughRecipes sends them from the server to the client

This allows mods like Just Enough Items to continue working on non-modded servers
after Minecraft 1.21.2, without switching to a Fabric server or installing extra
dependencies.
